CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Continued To Jan-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Albert Miklos Kun, Esq. (415-362-4000) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Caroline Allen.
Eric Shaw, Esq. (415-782-6830) of Weyand Law Firm for Defendant/Moving party (manager) Sampson Lung, Evergreen Holdings Inc., Gunnel Strom.

The Court announces the tentative ruling on the 2 demurrers. Plaintiff Argues and raises 2 issues: Defendant did not file a special demurrer and commercial rent control is not appicable. Defendant Argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants' (manager) Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to (1) allege facts re: Allen' standing; (2) join an indispensable party (no substantive opposition on this issue); and to (3) allege all elements of each cause of action in light of arguments raised by demurrer. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
